title: PUT /books/{id} assumes a JSON body
evidence: app.py:93 `data = request.get_json()` then `data.get(...)` at app.py:94 — a bodyless PUT yields None and raises AttributeError (500) instead of a 400
suggestion: Guard with `data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}` before calling .get()

title: Per-request DB connections are never closed
evidence: app.py:7 get_db() caches sqlite3 connection on g but there is no @app.teardown_appcontext to close/commit it
suggestion: Add a teardown_appcontext handler that pops g.db and closes it

title: README mislabels author filter as case-sensitive
evidence: README.md:61 says '(case-sensitive partial match)' but app.py:51 uses SQLite LIKE, which is case-insensitive for ASCII
suggestion: Correct the README to 'case-insensitive partial match' or add COLLATE BINARY

title: DB path threaded through process-global os.environ
evidence: app.py:33-34 create_app mutates os.environ['DATABASE_PATH']; init_db()/get_db() read it back — global state rather than Flask config
suggestion: Store db_path in app.config and read from there
